system.powerDescription:
A stunt double for the stage. You weave an illusion of up to CAT total size that may have any appearance you desire. 

For this illusion to be able to animate you must temporarily give up control of your own body. While you do this your body remains immobile where you were standing but your senses continue to operate from its location. The illusion may only make noise while animated If you attempt to fool a supernatural creature with this illusion, roll PSYCHE (or an appropriate skill such as connection, coordination, etc) to determine success. 

Gain or grant +1D when you or an ally next take advantage of this power. This power may easily modify the parameters of a roll.
